summary: Frontend testing for Pet Life OS fixes: Bundle cards, Quick Book service tiles, Anything Else form, and PersonalizedPicks component. All 4 main features tested and working correctly.

TEST_1_Bundle_Cards_Open_Modal.description: Bundle cards on CarePage have cursor-pointer and onClick handler that opens BundleDetailModal with header gradient, description, includes list, price (₹1,799), original price (₹2,196), discount (18% OFF), Paw Points (Earn 20), and Add to Cart button

TEST_2_Quick_Book_Grooming.description: Quick Book Grooming tile opens ServiceBookingModal with service selection (Full Grooming, Bath & Brush, Nail Trimming, Spa Package) and location options

TEST_3_Quick_Book_Vet.description: Quick Book Vet tile opens ServiceBookingModal with vet consultation options

TEST_4_Anything_Else_Tile.description: Anything Else tile opens Ask Concierge form with Name, Email, Phone, Pet Name, and request description fields

TEST_5_PersonalizedPicks_Imports.description: PersonalizedPicks component correctly imported and used in: DinePage (line 25, 210), CelebratePage (line 22, 317), StayPage (line 21, 562), LearnPage (line 19, 486), FitPage (line 31, 669), ShopPage (line 19, 497)

TEST_6_PersonalizedPicks_Visibility.description: PersonalizedPicks component only renders when user is logged in AND has pets registered. Component code verified at lines 230-232 of PersonalizedPicks.jsx

context_for_next_testing_agent: All requested features are working: 1) Bundle cards open detail modal on click, 2) Quick Book tiles (grooming, vet, training, walking) open ServiceBookingModal forms, 3) Anything Else tile opens Ask Concierge form, 4) PersonalizedPicks component is imported and used on all pillar pages (DinePage, CelebratePage, StayPage, LearnPage, FitPage, ShopPage). PersonalizedPicks only shows when user is logged in with pets.
